title: Fractal Generator
scenario: Create a prompt that generates a Python function to draw a Mandelbrot fractal using the Pillow library. The function should take two parameters: the width and height of the image. The output should include the complete Python function body, with the image drawn in the output. The prompt should be under 150 words and use present tense.
constraints: Must use the Pillow library for image manipulation
Must include a color map to highlight the fractal's boundary

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets the constraints.
Verify the output image quality and color map.
